summary: Frontend UI testing of Mydemy iOS glassmorphism redesign. All 5 tabs load correctly with the new iOS-style design. Pink primary color (#ef5ea8) applied throughout. Light gray background (#F2F2F7) visible on all tabs. Tab bar shows floating pill with pink active indicator. Auth screen renders correctly. Two non-blocking issues found.

minor.issue: 502 errors - backend API not responding. This doesn't block UI as screens show graceful empty states.

ui_bugs.issue: 'easing is not a function' runtime error - Easing.cubic is used but not available in react-native-web. Fix: replace Easing.cubic with Easing.poly(3) or Easing.bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1)
File is inside app/ directory which Expo Router scans for routes. Missing default export causes route warning. Fix: either add a default export or move the component outside of the app/ directory

issues: Header area has pink background but is NOT a glassmorphism design - it's a solid pink. The design spec mentions glassmorphism but the implementation shows a solid pink header region

Tab bar appears as a bottom bar with pink circle active indicator. The floating frosted glass pill shape is implemented (borderRadius: 9999) but on web the BlurView falls back to rgba(255,255,255,0.96) which looks like a white pill - looks clean and correct
Shows login prompt screens which is expected behavior - design looks clean with pink circle icons

action_items: Fix Easing.cubic not available on react-native-web in splash.tsx and PWAInstallPrompt.tsx - replace with Easing.poly(3)
Fix ComingSoonModal.tsx - add default export or move outside app/ directory to stop route warning
PWA install gate blocks web testing - design intentional but worth noting
critical_code_review_comments: Easing.cubic is not available in react-native-web, causing 'easing is not a function' runtime error in splash.tsx:34,48,61,157 and PWAInstallPrompt.tsx:100,114
ComingSoonModal.tsx in app/components/ is missing default export which Expo Router requires for files inside app/ directory - generates warnings
PWA install gate (_layout.tsx:53-54) blocks all web testing unless display-mode:standalone is simulated
context_for_next_testing_agent: App uses PWA install gate - must override matchMedia in Playwright to simulate standalone mode. Navigate to http://localhost:8081/home to bypass auth redirect. The app redirects unauthenticated users to /auth for learning/profile tabs. All 5 tabs load. Main easing bug is in splash.tsx using Easing.cubic which is not supported in react-native-web.
